candidates.why: Only ACT candidate shown, but it is explicitly non-current and not total current assets.
Explicitly non-current/held-for-sale, not total current assets.

candidates.row_label: Liabilities related to non-current assets held for sale
candidates.why: Liability line, not assets and not ACT.

variables.notes: No row labeled as total current assets or equivalent is visible. This appears to be an insurer/financial-style statement of financial position without a current/non-current total split.

candidates.why: Direct balance-sheet cash line; preferred for CHE over cash-flow statement reconciliation lines.

candidates.row_label: Cash and cash equivalents at the end of reporting period
candidates.why: Matches ending cash but CHE should come from the balance sheet when available.

candidates.row_label: Cash and cash equivalents at the beginning of reporting period
candidates.why: Cash-flow reconciliation line, but not the balance-sheet period-end cash target.
Only LCT candidate shown, but it is explicitly non-current and not total current liabilities.

variables.notes: No row labeled as total current liabilities or equivalent is visible. The statement appears not to present a current/non-current liability subtotal.

candidates.why: Debt-like liability, but no indication it is current; could include non-current amounts.
Financing liability, but not clearly current and likely includes longer-term amounts.

candidates.row_label: Capital Lease Maturities - Due within 1 Year
candidates.why: Clearly current maturity, but lease-related and should be excluded from STD under the baseline rule.
Includes leases and both long- and short-term amounts; excluded for baseline STD.

variables.notes: No clean non-lease short-term debt/current maturities row is visible. Available debt labels are not clearly current, and lease rows must be excluded.

candidates.why: Direct taxes payable label from shortlist, but preview values are blank; still semantically the best exact taxes-payable row if used historically.
Likely current tax liabilities/payable in some years; good fallback if the direct payable label is not populated.
Generic tax liability label, but less specific than the two alternatives above.

variables.notes: Priority list uses the most direct taxes-payable label first. Included the segment-level tax liability line as fallback because labels appear to vary over time and blanks in preview do not invalidate the row.

candidates.why: Direct total PPE line on the balance sheet; preferred over component or lease-related rows.

candidates.row_label: Right of Use Tangible Assets - Capital/Finance Lease - Gross
candidates.why: Tangible asset related to leases, but not total PPE and not preferred when a direct PPE line exists.

candidates.row_label: Property, Plant and Equipment - Balancing value
candidates.why: Balancing/subtotal style line, not preferred over the clean reported PPE line.
Direct total assets line on the balance sheet.
Direct net operating cash flow line; best match for OANCF.

candidates.row_label: Cash flow from/used in operating activities
candidates.why: Operating cash flow section header, not the net cash flow total.
